testsuite.name: Connection

testcase.name: should fail connect to invalid address

testsuite.system-out: 20:10:24.726 [nioEventLoopGroup-11-1] DEBUG io.netty.buffer.AbstractByteBuf -- -Dio.netty.buffer.checkAccessible: true 20:10:24.726 [nioEventLoopGroup-11-1] DEBUG io.netty.buffer.AbstractByteBuf -- -Dio.netty.buffer.checkBounds: true 20:10:24.730 [nioEventLoopGroup-11-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.ResourceLeakDetectorFactory -- Loaded default ResourceLeakDetector: io.netty.util.ResourceLeakDetector@5fbd112f
